events.targetLabel: Sammy · Live reply engine updated from playbook
events.summary: Wired Sammy reply playbook into live reply-generation path.
events.detail: Expanded intent classifier with support, alternative-method, tag, and noise categories. Added playbook-driven skip/hide routing. Tightened example scoring to penalize name-leading, rambling, Amazon-first, and salesy openers. Enforced 2-sentence brevity cap on factual intents. 79 lines added, 5 removed in mission-control-store.ts.

events.targetLabel: Sammy · Reply playbook created + learning batch 002
events.summary: Created Sammy reply playbook and imported learning batch 002 (100 additional historical comments).
events.detail: Reply playbook distilled from all learning data: 6 preferred reply structures, intent handling rules, short-answer rule, non-salesy tone rule, website-vs-Amazon rule. Batch 002 added 100 de-duplicated historical Meta comments bringing total to 201 unique examples across 11 intent buckets. Documented anti-patterns from legacy replies that should not be imitated.

events.targetLabel: Sammy · Learning batch 001 imported
events.summary: Imported learning batch 001: first-pass analysis of 20 actioned comments + 100-example historical pull from Meta Graph API.
events.detail: Analyzed 20 unique comment decision events (16 approved, 4 rejected), extracted 14 reusable guidance rules and 6 revision lessons from operator feedback. Pulled 100 historical comments from Meta Graph API spanning 2025-05-05 to 2026-03-05 (29 hidden, 38 no-reply, 33 replied-live). Classified into 13 intent buckets. Identified 10 cases where Todd overrode conservative no-reply recommendations — Sammy was too conservative on replying.

events.targetLabel: Sammy · Meta comment ops skill created
events.summary: Created sammy-meta-comment-ops skill definition and training plan.
events.detail: Defined operational framework for Sammy as a Meta comment triage and reply improvement agent. 158-line skill definition covering core goals, queue rules, action framework, learning loop methodology, intent buckets, reply quality standards, and retrieval-first drafting approach. Established 4-phase learning system: example capture, intent labeling, revision-to-rule extraction, retrieval before generation.

events.detail: Status moved from draft-ready to approved. Approved reply: Garbage disposal cleaner tablets won’t help with rusty water deposits. events.targetLabel: Reply to Facebook comment · Andy Video
events.summary: Todd approved Reply to Facebook comment · Andy Video.
events.detail: Status moved from draft-ready to approved. Approved reply: Grinding up lemons will work short term but it won't get rid of the root problem of the smell. Our tablets are designed to remove all the grime and build up inside of your disposal to permanently remove the smell.

metadata.note: We need to talk about our products and not just some random comment. You need to get better. The answer should be that will work for the short term but that will just mask the smell. Our tablets help remove the dirt, grime, and build up inside your disposal to permanently remove it and not just mask the smell.
metadata.replyReadyToPost: Grinding up lemons will work short term but it won't get rid of the root problem of the smell. Our tablets are designed to remove all the grime and build up inside of your disposal to permanently remove the smell.
metadata.approvedReply: Grinding up lemons will work short term but it won't get rid of the root problem of the smell. Our tablets are designed to remove all the grime and build up inside of your disposal to permanently remove the smell.
